text:
Regeneration (, Saisei) is the 28 th volume of the Hunter × Hunter manga series. It was released by Shueisha on July 4 th , 2011 in Japan and by Viz Media on September 4 th , 2012 in English.

Chapters

291. Soliloquy (, Jimon)
292. Hidden Agenda (, Omowaku)
293. Metamorphosis (, Henbō)
294. Breakdown (, Kekkai)
295. Determination (, Ketsui)
296. Admission (, Kokuhaku)
297. The Last (, Saigo)
298. Rose (, Bara)
299. Regeneration (, Saisei)
300. Insurance (, Hoken)

Summary

Using his Ninety-Ninth Hand, Netero forces the King down into an underground chamber and is grateful for the opportunity to fight him. Having admiration for Netero's ability, the King's confidence doesn't waiver and he uses the pillars to increase his speed, relentlessly attacking Netero until he makes a mistake. Netero understands the King's strategy and plans to unleash his Zero Hand at the right moment.

Having been turned into a Chimera Ant, Palm confronts Killua and asks about Gon, but Killua refuses to answer. The two begin to fight, but Killua eventually breaks down sobbing and tells Palm that only she can help Gon now. Palm ignores Shaiapouf's commands and assures Killua that he is the one Gon needs. Elsewhere, Knuckle confronts Pouf and asks him to fight, and the Royal Guard disobeys Gon and flies away after bursting into hundreds of clones. Neferpitou panics and Gon tells them that they have ten fewer minutes to heal Komugi. Pitou realizes how dangerous Gon is and resolves to kill him to protect the King.

In the palace's basement, Welfin confronts and attacks Ikalgo, who fights against the centipedes from Welfin's Missileman and eventually learns that Palm may still be alive. After enduring thousands of strikes, the King severs Netero's right leg and asks for his name, but Netero quickly seals up the wound before the two exchange a thousand more blows. As he promised, the King then severs Netero's left arm and again asks for his name, but Netero summons his Zero Hand and unleashes an enormous blast directly upon the King. With Netero left gaunt from the attack, the King comes out only superficially harmed, and after Netero reveals the King's name, he pierces his own heart with his hand and detonates a Poor Man's Rose.

Youpi and Pouf arrive at the site of the explosion and find the King barely still alive. The two Royal Guards feed themselves to him and rejoice as he is brought back to life. Ikalgo, Killua, Palm, Knuckle, and Meleoron meet up and decide to fight until the end. Pitou finishes healing Komugi, and after Gon threatens to kill the girl, he and Pitou make their way to Peijin to heal Kite, with Komugi left behind as a hostage.
